div.div:
message:
[BrandA, toothpaste, $12.98, 100g
BrandB, toothpaste, $7.99, 80g
BrandC, toothpaste, $1.99, 100g]

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 588px; height: 1px; padding-top: 346px; margin-left: 3px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: PingFangSC-Regular; color: #252525; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: none; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
自定义动态规则：
如果消息以 BrandA 开头，发送至 BranchA-item-topic 和 BranchA-discount-topic
如果消息以 BrandB 开头，发送至 BranchB-item-topic 和 BranchB-discount-topic
其余消息发送至 Unknown-brand-topic
